raw.objective: “to examine and describe add-on LTG oral clearance (CL/F) in paediatric and young adult patients treated with CBZ and/or VPA”
raw.covariates: Included: WT, VPA, CBZ on CL
raw.observations: Step-wise function for WT on CL seems like data-driven modelling and does not allow accurate interpolation nor is physiologically supportable. Only interactions of CBZ+VPA on CL, or only VPA on CL modelled.
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL/F=theta1*(1+theta2**COTH1)*(1+theta3**COTH2)*(theta4**WT60)*(theta5**WT25)*exp(eta1) Ka=theta6 Vd/F=theta7*WT Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) COTH1: comedication with both carbamazepine and valproate (yes=1, no=0) COTH2: comedication with valproate alone (yes=1, no=0) WT60: weight at or above 60 kg (yes=1, no=0) WT25: weight at or below 25 kg (yes=1, no=0)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=4.23 theta2=-0.695 theta3=-0.876 theta4=1.69 theta5=0.775 theta6=3.5 theta7=1.2 omega1=0.178 sigma1=0.182

extraction_target.title: Pharmacokinetics of lamotrigine in paediatric and young adult epileptic patients--nonlinear mixed effects modelling approach.

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F=theta1*(1+theta2**COTH1)*(1+theta3**COTH2)*(theta4**WT60)*(theta5**WT25)*exp(eta1) Ka=theta6 Vd/F=theta7*WT Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) COTH1: comedication with both carbamazepine and valproate (yes=1, no=0) COTH2: comedication with valproate alone (yes=1, no=0) WT60: weight at or above 60 kg (yes=1, no=0) WT25: weight at or below 25 kg (yes=1, no=0)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to examine and describe add-on LTG oral clearance (CL/F) in paediatric and young adult patients treated with CBZ and/or VPA”

covariates.raw: Included: WT, VPA, CBZ on CL

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
